content_body: The property was better than we expected. We have been renting properties through VRBO in Georgia, North Carolina, Tennessee and this property was definitely the best. Last summer, we rented a different house in Blue Ridge and we liked the town so much that we decided to come back this year again. We are extremely concerned with cleanliness, but with this house there was not a single issue. Everything was perfect and clean. The view from every room is breathtaking. We stayed with my two kids, which are 18 and 14, and my parents-in-law. It was the best relaxing week. My wife and in-laws are already planning another trip to Blue Ridge again. I highly recommend this property!!!
title: Better Than We Expected
